description_long: This car store consists of a rectangular, single-story commercial building with a flat roof and a modern, minimalist design. The building features a main showroom area with large interior spaces, visible furniture, and partitioned rooms, likely for offices and customer service. In front of the building, there are multiple rows of cars displayed on raised platforms, organized by color and type, suggesting a focus on showcasing inventory to potential buyers. The cars are arranged in neat, parallel rows, with a variety of colors including red, blue, purple, gray, and black, enhancing the visual appeal. The exterior walls appear to be clad in a light, neutral material, possibly stone or concrete, with no visible glass facade or prominent signage. The overall layout is open and accessible, designed to attract customers and facilitate easy viewing of the vehicles.
description: A modern, single-story car store with a flat-roofed building and multiple rows of colorful cars displayed on platforms in front. The structure is minimalist, with partitioned interior spaces and no visible glass facade or signage.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main building, interior layout, and four rows of cars in various colors displayed on platforms.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the building and the arrangement of car platforms extending outward.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the back of the building and the symmetrical layout of the car display platforms.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the building's side and the car platforms from a different angle, emphasizing the separation between the building and the cars.
attribute_displayed_cars: 16 cars displayed on four platforms in front of the building; cars are in various colors (red, blue, purple, gray, black, white) and appear to be compact sedans or hatchbacks, arranged in neat rows.
